map_coverage: {done} le {total} du siwo ŋu woda akɔ ɖo vaseɖe fifia - wotsɔa susɔeawo kpena ɖe eŋu gbesiagbe.
cur_so_far: {year} vaseɖe fifia (vaseɖe {day} {month}): {v} °C le mama dedie nu, {d} °C tsɔ wu ƒe 1961-1990 ƒe mama dedie na ƒea ƒe ŋkeke mawo ke.
cmp_title: Tsɔ du eve sɔ kple wo nɔewo
cmp_hint: Curve ɖesiaɖe nye du ma ƒe ƒe sia ƒe anomaly vs eya ŋutɔ ƒe 1961-1990 gɔmedzedze, eyata teƒe siwo yame ƒe nɔnɔme to vovo la sɔ kple wo nɔewo dzɔdzɔe.
kpi_since: Xexeame ƒe dzoxɔxɔ tso ƒe 1940 me
kpi_warmest: Ƒe si me dzoxɔxɔ le wu (xexeame ƒe mamã dedie).
sum_season: Dzoxɔxɔ kabakaba wu le afisia: {season} ({v} °C le ƒe ewo ɖesiaɖe me).
sum_month: Ɣleti si me dzoxɔxɔ le kabakaba wu le afisia: {month} ({v} °C le ƒe ewo ɖesiaɖe me).
grid_alias_note: Wobu dzoxɔxɔ ƒe nuŋlɔɖi le ~11 km yame ƒe nɔnɔme-nyatakaka grid cell ɖesiaɖe me. {alias} ma eƒe lãmenugbagbevi kple {city}, eyata wo ame evea siaa ɖe ƒe 1940-fifi ŋutinya ɖeka fia.
map_coverage_help: Kpe asi ɖe nyatakakaawo nuƒoƒoƒu ŋu
qv_nodata: Du sia ŋuti nyatakaka aɖeke meli haɖe o.
qv_nearest: Du si me wodzro si te ɖe eŋu wu
guide_body:
• Dots / bars: asixɔxɔ si le ƒe ɖesiaɖe ŋu.
  • Bold colored curve: a LOESS smoother: nutoa me ƒe nɔnɔme, si woate ŋu abɔbɔ faa, ale be nàte ŋu akpɔ alesi wòtrɔna kabakaba le ɣeyiɣi aɖe megbe (e.g. dzoxɔxɔ ƒe tɔtrɔ kabakaba le emegbe ~1985).
  • Fli si wotso: dzɔdzɔe sesẽ (Theil-Sen) ƒe nɔnɔme; eƒe dzidzeme nye “ƒe ewo ɖesiaɖe” ƒe xexlẽme le xotutua me.
  • p<0.05 / n.s.: Mann-Kendall ƒe vevienyenye: nenye be nɔnɔmea nye nyateƒe le akɔntabubu nu alo ate ŋu anye toɣliɖeɖe ko (n.s. = meɖe dzesi o). Zi geɖe la, dzoxɔxɔ ɖe dzesi ŋutɔ; tsidzadza zi geɖe menye nenema o.
  • Vɔvɔli ƒe ƒuƒoƒo: ŋutinya ƒe didime bliboa le ƒewo katã me na ɣleti ma.
  • Dzoxɔxɔ ƒe nɔnɔmetata ƒe amadedewo: dzoxɔxɔ (blue cold → red warm); xlẽ sɔti aɖe tso ete yi dzi be nàkpɔ ɣleti ma ƒe tɔtrɔ le ƒeawo me.
threshold_title: Dzoxɔxɔ & tsikpe ŋkekewo le ƒea me, {name}
yearly_title: Ƒe sia ƒe ƒe dzoxɔxɔ le mama dedie nu to ƒeawo me, {name}.
yearly_ylabel: Ƒe sia ƒe ƒe dzoxɔxɔ le mama dedie nu (°C).
annual_mean: ƒe sia ƒe ƒe mama dedie
anomaly_title: Ƒe sia ƒe ƒe dzoxɔxɔ ƒe vovototo, {name}.
vs_full: tsɔ wu ɣeyiɣi bliboa ƒe mama dedie ({base:.1f} °C).
heatmap_title: Ɣleti sia ɣleti ƒe dzoxɔxɔ le mama dedie nu le ƒe nu, {name}.
heatmap_cbar: Ɣleti sia ɣleti ƒe mama dedie (°C).
anom_heatmap_title: Ɣleti sia ɣleti ƒe nusi mesɔ o tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple {base}, {name}.
subtitle: {start}-{end} · {days} ŋkeke · dzoxɔxɔ wu {wy} ({wv:.1f} °C), vuvɔ wu {cy} ({cv:.1f} °C)
card_warmest: Ƒe si me dzoxɔxɔ le wu
card_coldest: Ƒe si me vuvɔ nɔ wɔwɔm wu
extreme_weather: Yame ƒe nɔnɔme si gbɔ eme
analog_line: Kaka ƒe 2050 naɖo la, nutoa me yame ƒe nɔnɔme ate ŋu ase le eɖokui me abe alesi {analog} le egbea ene, anɔ abe +{d} °C ene.
analog_past: Le ƒe 1940 me la, nutoa me ƒe yame ƒe nɔnɔme se le eɖokui me wu abe alesi {analog} le egbea ene, abe {d} °C ene fa wu.
cap_yearly: Ƒe sia ƒe ƒe mama dedie kple LOESS smoother (ɖea ablaɖeɖe fiana) kple Theil-Sen ƒe nɔnɔme sesẽ +vevienyenye
cap_anomalies: Ƒe sia ƒe ne wotsɔe sɔ kple ƒe 1961-1990 ƒe mamã dedie tɔ: ati dzĩwo xɔ dzo wu, blɔwo fa wu. Trɔtrɔ tso blɔ akpa gãtɔ dzi va zu dzĩ akpa gãtɔ dzie nye dzoxɔxɔa.
cap_heatmap: Ɣleti ɖesiaɖe ƒe mamã dedie na ƒe ɖesiaɖe abe amadede ƒe ƒuƒoƒo (2 °C ƒe ƒuƒoƒo). Xlẽ sɔti aɖe yi dzi be nàkpɔ ɣleti ma wòaxɔ dzo le ƒe bla naneawo me.
cap_anom_heatmap: Grid ma ke, gake wodzidzea ɣleti ɖesiaɖe ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe 1961-1990 ƒe nɔnɔme si sɔ nu, eyata tɔtrɔa koe ɖee fia (dzẽ xɔ dzo wu alesi wònɔna ɖaa, blɔ fafɛ), ɣeyiɣi ƒe tsatsam la ɖa.
cap_threshold: Ŋkeke siwo ƒe sia ƒe wu dzoxɔxɔ 18 °C (dzoxɔxɔ) kple esi mede 0 °C (tsikpe). Nɔnɔme sesẽ eve siwo le tsatsam fia be ŋkeke siwo dzi dzoxɔxɔ le sɔ gbɔ wu ŋkeke siwo dzi tsikpe le fifia.
hint: Zi afi sia afi alo zi Esc dzi be nàtu
intro: Alesi xexeame ƒe du gãwo xɔ dzoe tso ƒe 1940 me: gbesiagbe dzoxɔxɔ ŋuti nuŋlɔɖi siwo tso ERA5 ƒe yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti numekuku gbugbɔgawɔ me.
map_heading: Yame ƒe dzoxɔxɔ le xexeame godoo
map_sub: Tia du aɖe le anyigbatataa dzi alo tso xexlẽdzesiawo me
omni_ph: Di du, dukɔ, nuto alo teƒe ɖesiaɖe
range_title: Ɣleti sia ɣleti ƒe dzoxɔxɔ ƒe didime le ƒeawo me, {name}.
range_min_max: min-max {start}-{end} ƒe xexlẽme si sɔ gbɔ wu.
range_ylabel: Yame ƒe dzoxɔxɔ le mama dedie nu ɣleti sia ɣleti (°C).
cap_range: Ɣleti ɖesiaɖe ƒe min-max ƒe didime le ƒeawo me, kple ƒe mamlɛtɔ. Ðe wònye asikpakpla kɔ na nugbɔ si me dzo le la?
record_title: Ɣleti sia ɣleti ƒe nuŋlɔɖi si kɔkɔ/si bɔbɔ gbesiagbe, {name}.
cap_records: Ɣleti sia ɣleti ƒe ɣeyiɣi ɖesiaɖe ƒe nuŋlɔɖi gbesiagbe ƒe kɔkɔme kple bɔbɔ, kple ƒe mamlɛtɔ ƒe nusiwo gbɔ eme
volatility_title: Yame ƒe dzoxɔxɔ ƒe tɔtrɔ gbesiagbe, {name}.
cap_volatility: Zi nenie dzoxɔxɔ ƒe titri gãwo dzɔna gbesiagbe ƒe sia ƒe (≥6 °C), dzoxɔxɔ ƒe tɔtrɔ
precip_annual: ƒe sia ƒe ƒe xexlẽme bliboa
cap_precip: Tsidzadza bliboa ƒe sia ƒe (tsidzadza kple sno tsi) kple nɔnɔme aɖe
cap_stripes: Fli ɖesiaɖe nye ƒe ɖeka ƒe dzoxɔxɔ: blɔ fa wu, dzĩ xɔ dzo wu ƒe 1961-1990 ƒe mamã dedie. Alesi wòdzo tso blɔ dzi yi dzĩe nye dzoxɔxɔa, eye naneke meli woaxlẽ o negbe amadede ko.
cap_season: Dzoxɔxɔ ƒe tsitsi ƒe ɣeyiɣi ƒe didime ƒe sia ƒe (ŋkeke siwo ƒe duƒuƒu kple gbesiagbe mamã dedie ≥ 5 °C): fesre dzi agbledede si me vuvɔ mele o nɔ te ɖe edzi, edidina ne yame ƒe nɔnɔme le dzo dam.
dtr_title: Ŋkeke ƒe dzoxɔxɔ ƒe didime (ŋkeke − zã), {name}.
dtr_ylabel: Gbesiagbe max − min (°C) le mama dedie nu.
dtr_annual: ƒe sia ƒe ƒe mamã dedie ƒe didime
cap_dtr: Vovototo si le ŋkeke ɖesiaɖe ƒe kɔkɔƒe kple bɔbɔe dome le mama dedie nu. Nusi le ɖeɖem kpɔtɔ nye asibidɛ si le dzoxɔxɔnamɔ̃ me: zãwo ƒe dzoxɔxɔ kabakaba wu ŋkekewo; esi keke ta ate ŋu afia be eƒu.
seasonshift_ylabel: Yame ƒe dzoxɔxɔ le mama dedie nu ɣleti sia ɣleti (°C).
cap_seasonshift: Ƒe si le mama dedie nu na gbãtɔ vs. ƒe ewo mamlɛ siwo woŋlɔ ɖi. Dometsotso si le fliawo dome le ɣleti ɖesiaɖe me ɖea ƒea ƒe akpa siwo me dzoxɔxɔ le wu fiana (zi geɖe la, dzomeŋɔliwo sɔa gbɔ wu dzomeŋɔli).
health_sub: Alesi dzoxɔxɔ ƒe nɔnɔme siwo le etame la trɔna zua dzoxɔxɔ, vuvɔ kple nudzɔdzɔ siwo gbɔ eme ƒe xexlẽdzesi siwo wonya. Tabla ɖesiaɖe adze le afisi nyatakaka siwo wòhiã le.
cap_degreedays: Ƒe sia ƒe ƒe dzoxɔxɔ-akɔfafa ƒe agba: dzoxɔxɔ ƒe hiahiã (si mede 18 °C o) ɖiɖina esime fafa ƒe hiahiã (si wu 22 °C) dzina ɖe edzi, si nye vuvɔ ƒe tsɔtsɔ kple yaƒoƒo ƒe didi teƒenɔla.
heatwave_ylabel: Dzoxɔxɔ ƒe ƒutsotsoewo ƒe ŋkekewo le ƒea me
cap_heatwave: Ŋkekewo le dzoxɔxɔ ƒe ƒutsotsoe me: duƒuƒu si xɔa ŋkeke ≥3 kple gbesiagbe ƒe kɔkɔƒe si wu nutoa me ƒe 1961-1990 ƒe alafa memamã 90 lia. Dzoxɔxɔ si nɔa anyi didi le ŋkeke me ye nye nu vevitɔ si nana dzoxɔxɔ ƒe ƒutsotsoewo kuna fũu akpa.
tropic_title: Zã siwo me dzoxɔxɔ le ƒe sia ƒe, {name}
cap_tropic: Zã siwo me dzoxɔxɔ si bɔbɔ ɖe anyi la nɔa 20 °C alo wu nenema, eyata ŋutilãa mekpɔa gbɔdzɔe aɖeke le zã ɖeka me o, si nye nusi kplɔa ame vevitɔ, si dzi woŋea aɖaba ƒuna zi geɖe, si hea ku si tsoa dzoxɔxɔ gbɔ vɛ.
cap_coldspell: Ŋkekewo le vuvɔŋɔli me: duƒuƒu ≥ŋkeke 3 kple gbesiagbe ƒe bɔbɔe si le nutoa me ƒe 1961-1990 ƒe alafa memamã 10 lia te. Vuvɔ si nɔa anyi didi nana dzitodzito kple gbɔgbɔtsixe ƒe ku si gbɔ eme le dzomeŋɔli.
heavyrain_title: Tsidzadza gãwo ƒe ŋkekewo le ƒea me, {name}
cap_heavyrain: Ŋkeke siwo dzi tsi dzana milimeta 20 ya teti (ETCCDI R20mm), tsidzadza si hea tsiɖɔɖɔ vɛ si hea abixɔxɔ, ʋuʋu kple dɔléle siwo tsoa tsi vɛ vɛ.
heatindex_title: Dzoxɔxɔ ƒe dzesi ŋkeke siwo me afɔku le ƒe sia ƒe, {name}.
cap_heatindex: Ŋkeke siwo dzoxɔxɔ si dze abe (dzoxɔxɔ ƒe dzesi, si ƒoa xlãe le fafa me) ɖoa dzoxɔxɔ ƒe nuteɖeamedzi ƒe seƒe, si dutoƒo dzoxɔxɔ ŋuti aɖaŋuɖoɖowo zãna. Hiã na nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si dze abe dzoxɔxɔ ene.
footer: Wowɔ {date} · nyatakakawo tso Open-Meteo ŋutinya me gbugbɔgadzro (ERA5) · tsoƒe le GitHub
